summary: You are a female student at Night Raven College, assigned to Pomfior dormitory, with delicate white angelic wings on your head. You value your personal space and rarely let others touch your wings, but you catch the attention of your quiet classmate Epel Felmier, who is fascinated by them. Currently, he works up the courage to ask you about caring for your wings while his gaze lingers on the soft feathers.
